channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: ‘STAGED’: Conspiracy Theories Are Everywhere Following White House Correspondents' Dinner Shooting
item.description: The word “staged” exploded on social media following the attack, as both right and left-wing influencers and anonymous accounts spread unfounded conspiracy theories.

item.title: Skylight’s 15-inch smart calendar is down to its lowest price to date
item.description: When you’re juggling more than just your own calendar, staying organized can be overwhelming. Fortunately, the Skylight Calendar 2 can help simplify things by syncing multiple calendars in a single spot, and now through May 7th, it’s available directly from Skylight for $259.99 ($40 off), its best price to date. Skylight’s 15-inch smart calendar improves […]...

item.title: On est monté à bord du Zeekr 8X : 1 381 ch, une recharge en 9 minutes et un luxe indécent face à Porsche et Mercedes
item.description: Avec son architecture 900V, ses 1 381 ch en version trimoteur et un intérieur digne d’une limousine, le Zeekr 8X est probablement le SUV hybride rechargeable le mieux fini que nous ayons approché en Chine. Nous sommes allés le découvrir en concession à Shenzhen.

item.title: La batterie au sodium franchit un cap décisif : vers la fin du lithium ?
item.description: Une équipe de chercheurs a développé une batterie au sodium tout-solide fonctionnant à température ambiante et même en dessous de zéro.

item.title: There’s one iOS 27 upgrade I want to see at WWDC 2026 — and it isn't Siri 2.0
item.description: With WWDC 2026 just around the corner, I’d love to see Apple revamp the Shortcuts app in iOS 27.

item.title: La Samsung Galaxy Ring 2 se fait désirer, mais la première, la meilleure du marché, est à -44 %
item.description: Presque deux ans après sa sortie, la Samsung Galaxy Ring reste encore aujourd'hui la meilleure bague connectée du marché. En ce moment, la Fnac et Darty l'affichent à 249,99 euros au lieu de 449,99 euros.

item.title: The Bose SoundLink Flex is back to its Black Friday price on Amazon
item.description: Save 20% on the Bose SoundLink Flex on Amazon — a fantastic all-round Bluetooth speaker that's back to its Black Friday price.

item.title: After three months on Linux, I don’t miss Windows at all
item.description: In January I finally made good on my threat/promise to install Linux on my desktop. I wanted to see how far I could get using a Linux PC as my main computer without doing a bunch of research beforehand or troubleshooting afterwards. Since then I have booted into Windows exactly twice: once to scan a […]

item.title: I've worn the Garmin Tactix 8 for 8 weeks, and elite adventurers will love this watch — but most of you probably don't need it
item.description: The Garmin Tactix 8 is the ultimate one-watch solution for tactical operators. With an unbelievable battery life and dedicated tactical features, there's nothing better on the market at the moment.

item.title: What is the release date for The Testaments episode 6 on Hulu and Disney+?
item.description: Episode 5 has been described as "like prom, but full of old creeps." But when does The Testaments episode 6 drop on Hulu and Disney+?
